data.title: Koryx Copper closes $46M bought deal financing and $5M Namibian private placement.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has hit a record low of 3.5%, down from the previous rate of 4.2%. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the job market, with over 250,000 new jobs being created in the last quarter. Additionally, the report highlighted a rise in average hourly earnings by 2.5%, indicating a positive trend in wage growth. Experts attribute this positive shift to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business investments. Overall, the latest data suggests a strong and growing economy with promising opportunities for job seekers.

data.title: Real estate veterans Anne Arnold & Ammie Archer join forces to form premier Brunswick County team on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: In Brunswick County, North Carolina on January 20, 2026, renowned real estate agents Anne Arnold and Ammie Archer have joined forces to establish the Anne Arnold & Ammie Archer Real Estate Team. This collaboration brings together two highly accomplished professionals in the industry.

data.title: Washington investing $2.5B in securing critical minerals. Structural changes in capital markets observed.
data.description: A press release from Ares Strategic Mining Inc. in Vancouver, BC on Jan. 20, 2026, indicated that there are changes in the North American capital markets as bipartisan Congressional proposals discuss establishing a $2.5 billion Strategic Resilience Reserve.

data.title: Global mining sector sees record margins, top-tier firms report low All-In Sustaining Costs (AISC) in 2026.
data.description: Announced by RUA GOLD Inc. based in Vancouver, BC on January 20, 2026, the current update reveals that the global mining industry is experiencing significant changes. This includes top-tier companies reaching record high margins due to expanding producer costs. Presently, these leading firms are disclosing All-In Sustaining Costs (AISC) as part of this structural realignment in the industry. This development showcases the growing profitability within the mining sector.

data.title: Wearable tech market to reach $176.77B by 2030, growing at 15.9% CAGR from $84.53B in 2025 - MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 20, 2026, research from MarketsandMarkets™ indicates significant growth in the Wearable Technology Market. Projections show a rise to USD 176.77 billion by 2030, up from USD 84.53 billion in 2025, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.9% during this forecast period. The report includes an analysis across 195 market data Tables and 95 Figures, highlighting the sector's potential expansion in the coming years.

data.title: MAIA Biotech progresses Ateganosine cancer treatment, targeting 2026 clinical milestones for Phase 3 NSCLC trial with high efficacy.
data.description: There is a strong chance of technical success in the pivotal Phase 3 trial due to exceptional efficacy data for treating third-line non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). The data suggest promising outcomes for patients, with high effectiveness rates in the study. This news indicates a significant advancement in medical research and treatment, potentially offering new hope to those affected by NSCLC.

data.title: Saleo introduces AI Demo Agent offering 24/7 autonomous product demos in multiple languages for B2B, enhancing user experience.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, the prominent AI-native demo platform Saleo unveiled its latest offering, the AI Demo Agent. This innovative agent is capable of providing fully conversational, autonomous product demonstrations in multiple languages around the clock. Created to deliver unlimited access to dynamic demos, the AI Demo Agent is set to revolutionize the way products are showcased.

data.title: PR Newswire's Amplify™ named finalist for 2026 PRWeek Awards US in Best AI Platform category. Highlighting enhanced customer platform with integrated AI tools.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, PR Newswire was announced as a finalist for the 2026 PRWeek Awards US in the Best AI Platform category. This acknowledgment showcases the company's innovative customer platform, PR Newswire Amplify™, that incorporates AI tools throughout various essential points of operation. This recognition showcases the company's commitment to utilizing advanced technology in its services.

data.title: Andromeda Ventures launching at SpaceCom | Space Congress 2026, focusing on dual-use tech. #VentureCapital #SpaceTech
data.description: On January 20, 2026, a venture capital firm called Andromeda Ventures unveiled its new platform aimed at supporting mission-critical, dual-use technologies that enhance infrastructure, security, and human capabilities on Earth. The focus is on fostering sustainable advancements in these areas.

data.title: Global dihydromyrcenol market valued at USD 911.9 million in 2025, projected to reach USD 1.86 billion by 2035 with 7.4% CAGR.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, as of January 20, 2026, reports indicate that the worldwide market for dihydromyrcenol is valued at approximately USD 911.9 million in 2025. Projections suggest that this market is expected to expand significantly, reaching approximately USD 1,862.1 million by the year 2035. This growth is anticipated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.4% throughout the forecast period.

data.title: RiskExec strengthens security with SOC 2 Type II audit. Validates controls for vendor risk and audit. Located in TN.
data.description: An audit conducted independently has confirmed that RiskExec's security and operational controls have remained effective over time, aligning with vendor risk, audit, and examiner requirements. The audit report reaffirmed RiskExec's reputation as the top compliance reporting and analytics platform for banks. The validation was carried out in Knoxville, Tenn. on Jan. 20, 2026.

data.title: Bybit P2P celebrates 4th anniversary with 100,000 USDT prize pool; world's 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, Bybit, celebrates the fourth anniversary of its peer-to-peer platform, Bybit P2P. In honor of this milestone, Bybit is excited to announce a round of rewards for its users. Over the course of four years, Bybit has successfully facilitated cryptocurrency transactions and fostered trust among its widespread user base.

data.title: BondBloxx celebrates growth and 1 year of PCMM, a private credit ETF, with significant milestones achieved by the fund and firm.
data.description: BondBloxx is commemorating the one-year anniversary of its private credit ETF, PCMM. The fund has achieved numerous milestones over the past year, with assets under management reaching $100 million. This success has solidified BondBloxx as a reputable player in the private credit market. The firm's CEO expressed gratitude for the support and trust from investors that has driven the growth and success of the ETF. BondBloxx looks forward to continued expansion and success in the future.

data.title: South Korea Data Center Market to reach USD 16.23 Billion by 2031, CAGR of 21.52%. 58 operational colocation data centers, 32 in Seoul.
data.description: A new report titled "Investment Analysis & Growth Opportunities 2026-2031 for the South Korea Data Center Market" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The market in South Korea was worth USD 5.04 billion in 2025 and is estimated to hit USD 16.23 billion by 2031, with a notable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 21.52%. Currently, South Korea has about 58 active colocation data centers, with Seoul housing approximately 32 of these facilities. Many of these data centers are already in operation.

data.title: CIG Shanghai expects over 50% profit rise, stocks fall despite growth, inflated P/E ratio at over 100.
data.description: CIG Shanghai reported a profit increase of over 50% last year, driven by improved margins in its wireless and photonics business. Despite the positive financial results, the company's stock experienced a sharp decline after the announcement. The stock is still trading at a high P/E ratio of over 100, which some analysts believe is overinflated due to the current AI-driven market trends. The market response to the company's strong profit forecast was negative, with the stock opening down more than 8% the day after the announcement. However, the stock is still up by 24.6% from its IPO price last September, when the company raised $577 million. CIG Shanghai has a long history dating back to the telecoms boom of the 1990s and is now part of the current market bubble that may be at risk of bursting. The company's stock trades at a much higher P/E ratio compared to more traditional networking equipment makers like Cisco and AsiaInfo. Overall, the market reaction to CIG's profit growth forecast highlights concerns about potentially over-inflated stock prices in the AI sector.

data.title: Harpak-ULMA debuts high-speed grind-line tray-sealing application with Mondini Sinfonia for ground-meat production.
data.description: A new development in automated packaging has been introduced by Harpak-ULMA in Taunton, Massachusetts. The Mondini Trave Sinfonia tray-sealing platform has been reimagined for high-volume ground-meat production. This innovation is set to enhance efficiency and streamline processes in this sector.

data.title: Courtney Mares appointed first Vatican Editor for OSV News, enhancing coverage of Pope Leo XIV and global Catholic Church.
data.description: OSV News has decided to boost its coverage of Pope Leo XIV and the worldwide Catholic Church by hiring Courtney Mares as its inaugural Vatican Editor. This addition comes as a strategic move to enhance the news organization's reporting on crucial topics related to the Church. Gretchen R. Crowe, the Editor-in-Chief of OSV News, unveiled this development on January 20, 2026. Courtney Mares will bring her expertise to the team after previously serving in a similar capacity. This step underscores OSV News's commitment to providing comprehensive and in-depth coverage of the Vatican and global Catholic Church.

data.title: ACA Group to offer help with timeshare contracts at U.S. events in early 2026, focusing on legal cancellation.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, ACA Group, a prominent national consumer advocacy organization focused on legally and permanently canceling unwanted timeshare contracts, disclosed its plan to participate in various consumer-oriented events throughout the United States. This initiative aims to reach a wider audience and provide assistance in nullifying timeshare agreements.

data.title: Katalyze AI launches Katalyst: AI Agent for pharmaceutical manufacturing, aimed at reducing manual work.
data.description: Today, in San Francisco, Katalyze AI unveiled Katalyst, a specialized AI agent tailored for pharmaceutical manufacturing. This innovative technology is created for GxP-regulated settings and aids manufacturing staff in cutting down on repetitive manual tasks, thereby speeding up scientific processes.

data.title: SIMPLi and Strava collaborate for "Moved By Motherhood" challenge, highlighting stroller miles as real movement.
data.description: A new initiative in Philadelphia starting January 20, 2026, seeks to incentivize mothers for the physical activity they engage in while using strollers. The partnership between SIMPLi, an organic pantry staples brand, and Strava, a popular fitness app, aims to recognize the effort mothers put into keeping their families active by reframing stroller miles as significant movement. This collaboration will reward moms for their consistency in encouraging physical activity within their families.
